# Gravemaw Juggernaut

## Tier 3 Bruiser

A massive, animate boulder with a crude, grinning face. It hurls itself across the battlefield with reckless force, each impact cracking its own unstable core.

**Motives & Tactics:** Crush targets through repeated impacts, build momentum, ignore self-preservation

> Difficulty: 18 | Thresholds: 24/48 | HP: 15 | Stress 10
> ATK: +7 | Bounce: Melee | 3d10+1 phy

## Features

**Compressed Mass - Passive:** The Gravemaw Juggernaut has resistance to physical damage. Damage dealt to the Juggernaut does not reduce its Stress.

**Runaway Momentum - Passive:** Each time the Juggernaut moves or is forced to move, it must mark a Stress.

**Crushing Impact - Action:** Make a standard attack. On a success, if the Juggernaut moved before this attack, increase the damage by 1d10.

**Unstable Core - Passive:** When the Juggernaut marks its last Stress, it explodes and is defeated. Each creature within Close range must make an Agility Reaction Roll (16) or take 2d10 physical damage.

> **Design notes:** When I played [_Clair Obscur: Expedition 33_](https://www.expedition33.com/ "Clair Obscur: Expedition 33"), I encounter a boss called [_Grosse Tete_](https://expedition33.wiki.fextralife.com/Grosse+Tete "Grosse Tete") with a unique and fun mechanic, so I tried to replicate here.
